## Feature Description / Change Description

`Feature Description` or `Change Description`: choose the heading that best
matches the diff, then explain what the PR does and how it is used or
observed.

## Implementation Approach

briefly explain the technical choice or core
implementation logic.

## Testing

explain how to verify the feature/change works.

## Why(optional)

explain the problem, user need, or maintenance gap when that
context is not obvious from the description section.

## Screenshots(optional)

for visible UI changes, and include before/after
screenshots only when they are actually available.

## Risks(optional)

call out reviewer attention areas, rollout concerns,
migration needs, or compatibility impact.
